title: Even Stronger Steel Production Growth Ex-China
section_path: Even Stronger Steel Production Growth Ex-China
section_path_text: Even Stronger Steel Production Growth Ex-China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, global steel production totaled approximately 139.6 million tons in December. This is down month-on-month by 500,000 tons and is down year-on-year by 4.9 million tons (-3%). Steel production outside of China totaled approximately 71.4 million tons.
